title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that allows users to define YAML workflows for AI coding that run in isolated git worktrees with any model provider. The marketplace will enable one-click installation of pre-built, battle-tested workflows for agentic engineering tasks.
